reference.title: Impact of quinidine on plasma and cerebrospinal fluid concentrations of codeine and morphine after codeine intake.
reference.abstract: Quinidine penetrates the blood brain barrier poorly, but quinidine pre-treatment leads to pronounced lowering of the cerebrospinal fluid concentration of morphine after codeine intake. However, the O-demethylation of codeine in CNS may not be totally blocked by quinidine.

_index.name: Sindrup1996
_index.title: Impact of quinidine on plasma and cerebrospinal fluid concentrations of codeine and morphine after codeine intake.
